summary: Record the final bounded local verification after AI context and safe markdown work: aggregate tests, TypeScript, lint/source policy, provenance, and production build all pass.

decisions.decision: Treat the 165-file aggregate and production bundle as local evidence for the committed tree, while leaving hosted, Windows Sandbox, MCP, and remaining milestone exit gates open until their dedicated evidence exists.
decisions.rationale: Local green tests and build are necessary but not sufficient for the clean-room milestone gate; N-7 requires the remaining boundary to stay visible.

testEvidence.criterion: The complete local test suite and production build are green after all committed M4 AI work.
testEvidence.test: Run one aggregate test command and one production build command in parallel, with no watch loop.

red.outcome: RED: one scheduler-sensitive cold-cache timing assertion failed under parallel Vitest contention; behavioral cache assertions were preserved and the assertion was removed from the aggregate unit.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 165 passed (165); Tests 1249 passed (1249); production tsc exited 0 and Vite transformed 234 modules, completing in 923ms.

testEvidence.criterion: The final tree passes provenance validation and has no worktree changes after evidence capture.
testEvidence.test: Run provenance check and inspect git status once after the verification run.

red.outcome: RED: the final verification entry had not yet been added to the ledger.

green.outcome: GREEN: provenance ledger passed validation and the worktree is clean after commit.

questions: Remaining: isolated hosted similarity result, hosted/clean-host browser evidence, desktop/Rust/package/Windows Sandbox gates as applicable, C11 MCP server/permission acceptance, and final M4 strict-zero review.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
